subcodes.first_line: O divine friends and ye who are attracted to the Kingdom of the All-Merciful! Among the divine ways and consummate wisdoms of the Eternal Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی و منجذبان ملکوت رحمانی از عادات الهی و حکمتهای بالغه صمدانی
subcodes.subjects: @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @bringing forth results; fruit, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
